channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo monthly.

item.title: ☕ juanjuandog/FinSight-AI (1000 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: juanjuandog

📝 Repository: juanjuandog/FinSight-AI

📄 Descrizione: AI equity research agent with resilient workflows, Redis Lua single-flight, pgvector RAG, versioned reports, evidence tracing, and RAG evaluation.

⭐ Stelle: 1000

🍴 Forks: 58

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent financial-research llm-evaluation pgvector postgresql rabbitmq rag redis spring-boot workflow-orchestration

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-11T11:19:40Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-05T06:13:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ fish2018/webhtv (368 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: fish2018

📝 Repository: fish2018/webhtv

📄 Descrizione: WebHomeTV 基于FongMi二次开发，增强了 WebHome 自定义首页、App Native SDK、网盘链接检测 和 Nostr推荐首页。 这个项目的核心目标是让 CSP 站点首页可以变成一个真正可开发的网页应用：开发者可以用 HTML/CSS/JavaScript 定制首页，再通过 App 暴露的 Native 能力完成搜索、播放、跨域请求、资源代理、最近观看、网盘检测和状态同步。

⭐ Stelle: 368

🍴 Forks: 107

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-22T07:10:04Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-05T06:09:29Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ ClouGence/open-cdm (291 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ClouGence

📝 Repository: ClouGence/open-cdm

📄 Descrizione: A free and open-source database management tool, suitable for team use. It offers capabilities such as access control, data anonymization, SQL auditing, CI/CD, and supports cross-regional deployment.

🍴 Forks: 58

💻 Linguaggio: Java

item.title: ☕ DevYangJC/Argus (118 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: DevYangJC

📝 Repository: DevYangJC/Argus

📄 Descrizione: 🌱 Argus 是一个基于 RAG 架构的开源知识库平台，后端采用 Java 21 + Spring Boot + MyBatis-Plus + PostgreSQL/pgvector，前端采用 Vue 3 + TypeScript + Element Plus，AI 层基于 Spring AI Alibaba（通义千问）+ ReactAgent 图引擎，以 MinIO + Elasticsearch 为存储与检索引擎。

⭐ Stelle: 118

🍴 Forks: 22

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-30T09:13:27Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-29T05:16:20Z
